etymology.description: 需(需) (xū, "to need; to require; to have to") + 要(要) (yào, "to want; to demand; essential; important") = a situation or thing that is both needed and wanted
etymology.interpretation: 需(需) (xū, "to need; to require") involves the idea of necessity, something you must have or do. 要(要) (yào, "to want; to demand") emphasizes desire or importance. Combining these, 需要(xūyào) indicates something that is both necessary and desired, hence 'to need'.

parts.english: to need; to require; to have to
to want; to demand; essential; important

examples.chinese: 我需要你的帮助(我需要你的幫助)。
如果你需要休息(如果你需要休息)，就告诉我(就告訴我)。
examples.pinyin: Rúguǒ nǐ xūyào xiūxī, jiù gàosù wǒ.
examples.english: If you need a rest, just tell me.

examples.chinese: 她需要更多的时间来完成工作(她需要更多的時間來完成工作)。
examples.pinyin: Tā xūyào gèng duō de shíjiān lái wánchéng gōngzuò.
examples.english: She needs more time to complete the work.
